headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 gap up and gap down stocks
summary: Looking for the S&P500 stocks that are experiencing notable gaps on Monday? Find out which stocks are gapping up and gapping down in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Anduril Joins List Of Key Army Suppliers, Wins $20 Billion Contract
summary: Drone-maker Anduril lands a $20 billion Army contract. Huntington is tapped for aircraft carrier decommissioning and RTX lands a $2 billion award.

raw.headline: Anduril Joins List Of Key Army Suppliers, Wins $20 Billion Contract
raw.summary: Drone-maker Anduril lands a $20 billion Army contract. Huntington is tapped for aircraft carrier decommissioning and RTX lands a $2 billion award.

headline: Media Advisory — Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School to Host Commencement Ceremony for 2025 Graduates
summary: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., March 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- What: HII’s (NYSE: HII) Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS) division will host commencement exercises for the Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School’s class of 2025 graduates. U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon will provide the commencement address. Members of the news media are invited to attend the graduation ceremony. This event is NOT open to the general public, but will be livestreamed:https://hii.com/events/apprentice-school-gra
